Name: MimecastEvents-CCF
Author: Mimecast - support@mimecast.com
Description:
The Mimecast Events (Push) solution ingests Mimecast security event data directly into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) Push pattern and the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

All Mimecast event types are unified in the `MimecastEvents_CL` table — Secure Email Gateway (Cloud Gateway, DLP), Targeted Threat Protection (URL Protect, Attachment Protect, Impersonation Protect), Audit, Cloud Integrated, and Awareness Training. The `mimecastEventType` column identifies the event type and is DERIVED in the DCR transform (not supplied by the push envelope — see parser comments for discrimination logic).

Per-type KQL parsers project the same column names as the legacy Function App connectors so existing queries require only a simple filter change. No Mimecast API credentials are stored in Microsoft Sentinel.
